summary: Ocean2Joy v2.0 — Demo Videos feature (JSON-LD SEO + Admin CRUD). All backend (16/16) and frontend flows PASS. Public list, streaming endpoints, admin auth guard, create/update/replace/reorder/delete, size & extension validation all verified. Homepage emits valid VideoObject JSON-LD with 2 entries and absolute https URLs. Admin UI: create modal, edit-in-place, delete with public list sync all work.
critical_code_review_comments: Clean implementation: size cap enforced while streaming upload chunk-by-chunk (no whole-file buffering).
_safe_ext validates by extension only; a .mp4 file containing non-video bytes would still pass. Acceptable for admin-only surface but worth noting.
Reorder endpoint iterates update_one in a loop — fine for small demo reel size but would benefit from bulk_write if the list ever grows.
Static seeded records (demo-1, demo-2) correctly return 404 on /api/public/demo-media/{id}/{video|poster} as designed.
JSON-LD uploadDate is set to current day on render; for SEO it's typically better to use the DB created_at timestamp to keep it stable. Minor enhancement only.
Admin endpoints correctly 401 when unauthenticated and 403 for role=client.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (JSON-LD, create, edit, delete flows all verified end-to-end)

seed_data_creation: Tests auto-create TEST_ prefixed demo videos and clean up via DELETE in fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo Videos feature fully verified. Backend endpoints in /app/backend/routes/admin.py (admin CRUD) and /app/backend/routes/public.py (list + streaming). Admin UI at /app/frontend/src/components/admin/DemoVideosManager.jsx integrated in AdminPanel. JSON-LD emitted in Homepage.jsx useEffect on demoVideos load. Static seeded records (demo-1, demo-2) serve files via frontend nginx from /videos/* and /posters/*; uploaded records stream via /api/public/demo-media/{id}/{video|poster}. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_demo_videos.py serves as regression suite.

frontend.homepage_jsonld_videoobject_present: PASS - 2 entries, required fields, absolute https URLs
frontend.admin_demo_videos_manager_section: PASS - data-testid present, below Payment Reference
frontend.admin_rows_for_seeded: PASS - demo-1 and demo-2 rows with all action buttons
frontend.admin_create_new_video: PASS - modal opens, accepts title+video+poster, closes on submit, new row appears
frontend.admin_edit_title_inplace: PASS - edit title, save, UI reflects immediately
frontend.admin_delete_row: PASS - confirm dialog accepted, row removed, public list no longer contains id
